title: CutList — Cut Region List with Nudge Controls
problem: Dragging cut region handles on a waveform on mobile is imprecise for fine adjustments (±100ms range). Users need a fallback precision control for exact trimming without requiring zooming in and dragging handles at the pixel level.
analysis:
CutList renders a collapsible list of all current cut regions below the EditorToolbar. Each cut row shows: cut index (Cut 1, Cut 2…), start time, end time, duration removed (`–M:SS`), and four nudge buttons (±10ms, ±100ms for each edge).

Expand/collapse per row: tapping a row header expands it to show the nudge controls. Expanded row also provides: 'Zoom to cut' (scrolls+zooms the waveform to show the cut region full-screen), 'Jump to start' (seeks playhead to cut start), remove button (×).

ExpandedCutId is controlled externally by WaveformEditor (not local state) so WaveformEditor can also programmatically expand a cut on drag-select.
successCriteria:
- All current cut regions listed in order (sorted by start time)
- Each row: index, startMs formatted, endMs formatted, duration removed
- Expand: shows ±10ms ±100ms nudge buttons for both start and end edges
- Nudge: updates cut boundary, respects 1s minimum region size and overlap constraints
- 'Remove' × button: removes this cut region, adds to undo stack
- 'Zoom to cut': calls parent's applyZoom + scroll to position cut region full-width in viewport
- ExpandedCutId prop (controlled) — parent manages which row is open
implementation: components/clips/CutList.tsx: props { cutMarks, expandedCutId, onExpandChange, onNudge, onRemove, onZoomToCut, onJumpToStart }. Renders one expandable row per cutMark. Nudge: onNudge(cutId, edge: 'start'|'end', deltaMs) — parent applies delta with constraint checks. No local state except animation helpers.

decisions.rationale: 10ms is fine-grained enough for frame-accurate trimming. 100ms is fast-traverse for larger adjustments. 1ms would require many taps; 1s steps would be too coarse for precise trimming. Two levels cover the full range of use cases.

knownLimitations: Long cut lists (>5 regions) push the submit button far down the page on mobile — consider a fixed submit button in future
Nudge does not debounce API calls — each tap writes to localStorage draft immediately but Postgres writes are batched at submit
userGuide: The cut list below the waveform shows all your marked cuts. Tap any cut to expand it and fine-tune the start or end time with the nudge buttons. Tap the × to remove a cut.
